◎简　　介  

　　Kelli Williams ("The Practice") joins the cast this season, playing Jacqueline "Jackie" Clarke, the ambitious wife of two-star Major General Kevin Clarke. Television icon Susan Lucci ("All My Children") makes several guest star appearances as Audrey, the wife of a retired Brigadier General, reuniting her with her former "All My Children" co-star Delaney.The series is based on ...
